creator: torfinn.ingolfsen@broadpark.no
text:
Today I tried to upgrade gxmms2 ffrom version 0.6.4 to 0.6.5 after doing a cvsup ofmy ports tree. portupgrade failed, so I tried it manually, but that failed too.
Here is the last part of the output after typing 'make' in the directory of the port:
grep: writing output: Broken pipe

===>  Configuring for gxmms2-0.6.5
===>  Building for gxmms2-0.6.5

Fix: 

None known by submitter at this time.
(Workaround: portdowngrade to version 0.6.4)
How-To-Repeat: 

1. upgrade your ports tree with cvsup
2. try to build audio/gxmms2 (either with portupgrade or manually)
